h1.visual_description: Main document title, typically found in the footer or at the start of major sections. Sans-serif, medium weight, blue color.
h1.example_text: Study on Plastics Use and Waste Management in the Food Service Industry

h2.visual_description: Sub-section heading starting with a bolded lowercase letter followed by a bolded title and a period. Inline with the paragraph text.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption, typically centered, italicized, and in blue text
Page footer containing page number and document title
Footnote entry at the bottom of the page, separated by a horizontal rule

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numeric superscript footnotes with corresponding definitions at the bottom of the page.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page number and document title located in the bottom margin (footer) in blue text. Footnotes located at the bottom of the text block above the footer, separated by a short horizontal line.
